description: Configure the 'My Portfolio' view in JStock to hide sensitive financial values for a client presentation. Customize the portfolio table columns to hide all absolute currency amounts (including Purchase Price, Current Price, Purchase Value, Current Value, Net Purchase Value, and Gain/Loss Value) while keeping the 'Units', 'Date', and percentage return columns ('Gain/Loss %' or 'Net Gain/Loss %') visible. Save a screenshot of this anonymized view to /home/ga/Documents/anonymized_portfolio.png.
